title: 4 Nights Wings Over the Wilderness Safari
description: A short fly-in safari exploring Samburu and Maasai Mara. Experience Kenya’s diverse landscapes, from rugged northern terrain to vast savannah plains, with luxury camps, guided game drives and scenic flights.
highlights: Game drives in custom 4x4 safari vehicles

itinerary.title: Fly to Samburu
itinerary.description: Depart from Wilson Airport to Samburu National Reserve. Transfer to camp and enjoy an afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Samburu Safari
itinerary.description: Full day game drives exploring Samburu’s unique wildlife including the Samburu Special Five.

itinerary.title: Fly to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Scheduled flight to Maasai Mara followed by an afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Full day exploring Maasai Mara with opportunities to spot the Big Five and seasonal migration.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Fly back to Nairobi Wilson Airport for departure.

included: Full board accommodation at safari camps
Park entrance fees for Samburu and Maasai Mara
Twice daily game drives with professional guide
Selected beverages including soft drinks, beers and house wines
accommodation: Soroi Luxury Migration Camp – Maasai Mara (2 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Light clothing for daytime and warmer layers for early mornings and evenings. Comfortable safari wear recommended.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals with a mix of international and local cuisine including bush dining experiences.

note: Pricing is indicative and may vary depending on season and availability. Single supplement applies.
